ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2002 Continued To Sep-25-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Sanctions in the sum of $250.00 issued to plaintiff's counsel, Donald Rogers Stebbins payable by 8/15/02. Osc continued to 9/25/02 to file proof of service obtain answer from or enter default. Osc and sanctions to plaintiff's counsel, Donald R. Stebbins.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Continued To Jul-31-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
